assets.note: Allowed: PNG, JPEG, WebP, GIF · max. 10 MB. Files are validated and stored under a safe name.

settings.languageNote: Your language is saved and applies after signing in again on other devices.

twofa.title: Two-factor authentication (2FA)
twofa.intro: Protects your account with a time-based one-time code (TOTP) from an authenticator app such as Google Authenticator, Aegis or 1Password.
twofa.scanHint: Scan the QR code or link in your authenticator app – or enter the key manually. Then confirm with a current code.
twofa.disableHint: Enter a current code from your app to disable 2FA.
twofa.enabledMsg: 2FA is now active. You'll need a code on every sign-in from now on.

tokens.title: API tokens
tokens.intro: Personal access tokens for the API. Send them in the Authorization: Bearer <token> header. They act with your permissions – treat them like a password.
tokens.name: Name
tokens.created: Token created – copy it now. It is shown only this once.
tokens.revokeConfirm: Revoke this token? Applications using it lose access immediately.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.intro: Devices and browsers currently signed in to your account. You can sign out individual sessions.
sessions.revokeOthersConfirm: Sign out all other sessions? Those devices will have to sign in again.

ingest.title: Ingest (MediaMTX)
ingest.offlineHint: MediaMTX is enabled but its API is unreachable. Is the container running (profile "mediamtx") and is MEDIAMTX_API_URL correct?
ingest.none: No active ingest connections right now.

ffmpegSec.title: FFmpeg security
ffmpegSec.vulnerableHint: The installed FFmpeg version is below {{min}} and may be affected by CVE-2026-8461 (MagicYUV). Please upgrade to a patched build.
ffmpegSec.unknownHint: The FFmpeg version could not be determined – please verify manually.

platformPush.unsupported: Metadata push is not available for this platform.

platforms.intro: Connect your YouTube/Twitch account via OAuth so CastCore can set stream metadata on your behalf. Tokens are stored encrypted.
platforms.disconnectConfirm: Really disconnect this account? The stored tokens will be deleted.
platforms.disabledHint: Not configured: {{providers}}. An admin sets the client id/secret and PUBLIC_BASE_URL in .env.

users.reset2faConfirm: Really reset 2FA for "{{user}}"? The user will then sign in with a password only and must set up 2FA again if needed.

backup.note: Backups contain the database & configuration as gz-JSON. Secrets stay encrypted – keep the ENCRYPTION_KEY safe and separate.
backup.restoreConfirm: Restore backup "{{name}}"? All current data will be overwritten.
backup.restoreDone: Restore complete. Please sign in again if users changed.

loghint.generic: A possible problem was detected – see the log.
loghint.source_missing: The source/file was not found. Check the path or mount.
loghint.network_unreachable: Network target unreachable. Check address, port and connection.
loghint.auth_failed: Authentication failed. Check stream key or credentials.
loghint.rtmp_rejected: The RTMP server rejected the connection. The stream key is likely wrong.
loghint.bad_media: The media could not be read (codec/container).

auth.token_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
auth.totp_required: This account has 2FA enabled. Please enter your code.
auth.totp_invalid: The 2FA code is invalid or expired.
auth.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.

setup.ffmpeg_not_found: FFmpeg was not found at the given path.

preflight.no_video: The input contains no video stream.
preflight.missing_stream_key: The destination is missing its stream key.

storage.test_failed: The connection to the source failed.

upload.unsupported_type: File type not supported (allowed: PNG, JPEG, WebP, GIF).

platform.not_connected: No connected {{provider}} account. Please connect one under Platforms first.
platform.token_expired: {{provider}} access has expired and could not be refreshed. Please reconnect the account.
platform.missing_scope: Missing permissions for {{provider}}. Please reconnect the account with the required scopes.
platform.invalid_category: Category {{category}} not found on {{provider}} – category was not set.
platform.invalid_broadcast: No active or scheduled {{provider}} live broadcast found.
platform.output_missing: No output destination with a URL is set.
